home.shortDescription: Experienced Software Engineer with over a decade in banking, insurance, and public sectors. Passionate about building reliable solutions and improving user experience.

about.name: About Me
about.description: I focus on building <highlight>reliable</highlight> applications, frameworks, pipelines, and scripts that thrive in enterprise environments.

backend.title: Core Backend Architecture
backend.description: Building robust services with <highlight>Kotlin, Java, Go, and Python</highlight>. I use a 'sandbox-first' approach to validate ideas quickly before scaling them into production-ready systems that work reliably across different languages.

items.kotlin_java: Spring Boot ecosystem with OpenAPI Maven generation
items.golang: High-performance services using Oapi-codegen and Goa v3
items.business_first_approach: Translating complex requirements into clean, scalable domain logic

devops.title: Pipeline & Reliability Engineering
devops.description: Keeping the delivery engine running. I build <highlight>automation tools and shared libraries</highlight> that help teams deploy faster and monitor their systems without the manual headache.

items.ci_cd: GitLab CI custom pipelines and Jenkins Shared Libraries
items.governance: Automating JIRA updates and release tracking
items.monitoring: Building Grafana dashboards and tracking SRE health metrics

quality.title: Automated Testing & Performance
quality.description: Building automated quality gates that guarantee <highlight>production readiness</highlight>. I build <highlight>automated test suites</highlight> that act as safety nets, so we can ship updates with confidence.

items.frameworks: API and E2E tests using Robot Framework, TestNG, PyTest and similar
items.load_testing: Simulating heavy traffic with JMeter and Locust
items.web_tools: UI automation with Selenium and standard testing libraries

distributed.title: Systems Integration & Security
distributed.description: Connecting complex systems in <highlight>banking and insurance</highlight> environments. I handle the heavy lifting of making services talk to each other securely and reliably using modern messaging and identity standards.

items.messaging: Handling data flow with Kafka and RabbitMQ
items.identity: Securing APIs with OAuth2, JWT, and certificate enrollment

frontend.title: Full-Stack Context
frontend.description: Developing modern, type-safe interfaces with <highlight>React and TypeScript</highlight>. I ensure that complex backend capabilities are exposed through intuitive and performant internal dashboards.

items.ui_stack: Building responsive apps with React and TypeScript
items.styling: Fast UI development with Tailwind CSS and Material UI
items.tooling: Building responsive tools for internal operations

projects.name: Projects
projects.projectADescription: A clean, responsive personal portfolio built with Next.js and Tailwind CSS to present my work and experience.

contact.title: Get in touch
contact.description: I’m always open to discussing new projects, creative ideas or opportunities to be part of your visions.
